Description

    RedisListAuditEventRepository(org.springframework.data.redis.core.StringRedisTemplate redisTemplate, String keyName, AuditEventMapper mapper)
    Constructor setting up the repository to log all events.
     
    RedisListAuditEventRepository(org.springframework.data.redis.core.StringRedisTemplate redisTemplate, String keyName, AuditEventMapper mapper, Predicate<org.springframework.boot.actuate.audit.AuditEvent> filter)
    Constructor setting up the repository to log events according to the supplied filter.
     
    RedissonTimeSeriesAuditEventRepository(org.redisson.api.RedissonClient client, String tsName, AuditEventMapper mapper)
    Constructor setting up the repository to log all events.

    Constructor setting up the repository to log events according to the supplied filter.
